testcase.name: test_1_1_signup_weak_password
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_release_gatekeeper.py:93: in test_1_1_signup_weak_password assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_1_5_protected_routes_redirect

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint /api/creator-pro/dashboard not protected assert 404 in [401, 403] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_release_gatekeeper.py:151: in test_1_5_protected_routes_redirect assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Endpoint {endpoint} not protected" E AssertionError: Endpoint /api/creator-pro/dashboard not protected E assert 404 in [401, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_url4_twinfinder_celebrities

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 20 >= 50 + where 20 = len([{'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Chris Hemsworth'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Scarlett Johansson'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Brad Pitt'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Angelina Jolie'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Leonardo DiCaprio'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Jennifer Lawrence'}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_release_gatekeeper.py:224: in test_url4_twinfinder_celebrities assert len(data["celebrities"]) >= 50 E AssertionError: assert 20 >= 50 E + where 20 = len([{'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Chris Hemsworth'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Scarlett Johansson'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Brad Pitt'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Angelina Jolie'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Leonardo DiCaprio'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Jennifer Lawrence'}, ...])

testcase.name: test_url6_pricing_products

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'subscriptions' in {'products': {'creator': {'credits': 300, 'name': 'Creator Pack', 'popular': True, 'price': 999}, 'pro': {'credits': 1000, 'name': 'Pro Pack', 'popular': False, 'price': 2499}, 'quarterly': {'credits': 500, 'name': 'Quarterly Subscription', 'period': 'quarterly', 'popular': False, ...}, 'starter': {'credits': 100, 'name': 'Starter Pack', 'popular': False, 'price': 499}, ...}, 'razorpayKeyId': 'rzp_test_SGjdYzFbt1TO8X'}
